reviews.review_description: this game is really good and then he also loves the secret behind stump i hope hormone releases soon his name is actually really good anyone willing to install the game has to install it right now i don't know what May look bad to you but for me it's not that's why i'm getting you to get this game they even have sandbox it's really cool you should play it

The movement sucks, you can't even climb wall climb and the player MODEL SUCKS. EVEN THE MODERATION SUCKS I GOT BANNED FOR DEFENDING SOMEONE BEING RACIST???

GAME IS DEAD MODERATION IS NEVER ONLINE AND THERE IS ONLY 1 PERSON IN A LOBBY OUT OF EVERY. 

AND I GOT MY IP LEAKED. 

To keep your IP safe don't play.
It's a good game it just has some bugs but I definitely recommend it

this game is soooo bad i cant even believe it, the movement is bad, i cant even move as good as other games. the player model sucks. This is just a copy of monkey place and they did a horrible job at it. The group of devs who made this game really needs to quit.

reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME SO MUCH
reviews.review_description: Whenever there is an update I always come on the game has definitely gotten better since when I got it I love the new cosmetics you are adding I prefer this game to gorilla tag it’s so good I highly recommend it
